title: HALL Winery Tasting
description:
Join us on Wednesday, April 8th from 4–7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a tasting featuring the polished, expressive wines of HALL Winery, one of Napa Valley’s most celebrated producers. This lineup highlights Hall’s signature style across Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, and Sauvignon Blanc.

Tasting Fee: $30 (Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded)

Featured Wines:

• Hall Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 – Dark berry fruit, black cherry, graphite, and ripe plum unfold over a full, supple palate with polished oak and a long, energetic finish.

• Hall Napa Valley Merlot 2019 – Deep and luxurious with violet, ripe cherry, baking spice, cocoa, and dusty tannins framed by lingering graphite notes.

• Hall Napa Valley Sauvignon Blanc 2024 – Bright and vibrant with tropical fruit, citrus, lilikoi, lemon curd, white flowers, and a crisp mineral finish.

Explore the elegance and balance that define Hall’s Napa Valley wines—buy a bottle and your tasting is free.
